free_text: Scattering of 6 MeV neutrons on vanadium
Natural vanadium, hollow cylinder, weight 120 gram,
height 5 cm, inner diameter 2 cm, outer one 3 cm .
Long counter for neutron flux monitoring
Corrections on the attenuation and multiple scattering
were made,calculated by the Monte-Carlo method
Error due to the scattered neutrons
ERR-ANALYS was corrected according now-days rule.
Ref.of YK was corrected . Ref. INDC-CCP- were added.
DATA -> DATA-CM. BIB information was added.
It gives whole V(n,n') spectra and not only for
It is angular integration of Subent 002.
